data.body: {"config":{"enforce_plan_material_pins":true,"require_plan_review_for_close":true},"cases":[{"name":"legacy_unpinned_claim_succeeds","command":"python -m rebar.cli claim <legacy_ticket_id> --assignee=fixture","expected_exit":0,"observed_exit":0,"before_status":"open","expected_after_status":"in_progress","observed_after_status":"in_progress","expected_reason_tokens":[],"observed_reason":"","passed":true},{"name":"current_pins_execution_review_close_succeeds","command":"python -m rebar.cli transition <current_pinned_ticket_id> in_progress closed","expected_exit":0,"observed_exit":0,"before_status":"in_progress","expected_after_status":"closed","observed_after_status":"closed","expected_reason_tokens":[],"observed_reason":"","passed":true},{"name":"stale_material_pin_drift_rejects_claim","command":"python -m rebar.cli claim <stale_pinned_ticket_id> --assignee=fixture","expected_exit":1,"observed_exit":1,"before_status":"open","expected_after_status":"open","observed_after_status":"open","expected_reason_tokens":["stale-pin-drift","<canonical_prerequisite_id>"],"observed_reason":"reviewed related-ticket material is stale (stale-pin-drift; targets: <canonical_prerequisite_id>)","passed":true},{"name":"planning_phase_close_review_rejects_close","command":"python -m rebar.cli transition <planning_review_ticket_id> in_progress closed","expected_exit":1,"observed_exit":1,"before_status":"in_progress","expected_after_status":"in_progress","observed_after_status":"in_progress","expected_reason_tokens":["incompatible-phase","review-plan"],"observed_reason":"plan-review close gate rejected incompatible-phase review and instructed: Run rebar review-plan <planning_review_ticket_id> separately, then retry close.","passed":true}]}
